issues: Minor: plan.mf says '7 tables' for M3 but doc correctly says '9 tables + 2 FTS5' -- good, no issue
Slight redundancy between 'How All the Pieces Fit Together' section and the architecture diagram, but acceptable for a context document targeting an LLM
Fixed: QueryResult model showed 'params' without type annotation; actual code has 'params: List[Any]', not Dict. Clarified in the description.
main.py listed as ~1,300 lines; actual is exactly 1,300 -- acceptable rounding

Missing: scripts/metadata/review_log.py (218 lines) and scripts/metadata/interaction_logger.py (100 lines) not listed in the metadata subsystem section (they appear in 05_metadata_workbench.md instead)
Excellent coverage with concrete examples at each stage
agents table described as '14 columns' in the header but the column listing shows 16 entries (including provenance_json). The '14+' notation in doc 06 is more accurate.
End-to-end example is very strong and aids comprehension
Minor: FilterField lists 'agent' as a field value, which is deprecated in code (should use agent_norm). The doc doesn't flag the deprecation, but the code does via a comment.
Includes review_log.py and interaction_logger.py coverage that 02_code_map.md lacks -- good cross-reference
Correction flow example is excellent for understanding the feedback loop
Fixed: QueryResult.params was listed as 'Dict' but actual code uses 'List[Any]'. Corrected.
Comprehensive normalization rules reference table is very valuable
Confidence score interpretation table is excellent for cross-referencing
Fixed: app/api/main.py was listed as 1,288 lines; actual count is 1,300. Corrected to 1,300.
Development commands reference is thorough and practical
Known gaps section aligns well with audit report findings
